context.setting: Working on laptop with laptop on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes working on a laptop or tablet positioned to the user's right AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip requirement THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility/access to the right-side workspace.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control, making outside-mouth transfer physically unsuitable.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN not applicable BECAUSE the user's physical needs support inside-mouth transfer rather than outside-mouth transfer.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons, and the observed choice favors low-effort automated initiation over explicit user signaling.

IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons, and the observed choice favors low-effort automated initiation over explicit user signaling.

IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons, and the observed choice favors low-effort automated initiation over explicit user signaling.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes user effort and is compatible with the user's severe upper-limb paralysis.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes user effort, and the user has good head/neck control for gesture-based completion.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes user effort, and the user has good head/neck control for gesture-based completion.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes working on a laptop or tablet positioned to the user's right AND affective state is neutral AND food has no special sauce/dip requirement THEN no BECAUSE the user accepted a faster, less interruptive workflow even while caring about right-side occlusion.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce option AND dining context is working on a laptop or tablet AND affective state is neutral THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly avoided dipping in a work-oriented context, consistent with prioritizing cleanliness and efficiency.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF any dining context AND any affective state AND any food condition THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the observed profile favors fast pacing and automation.
